## Summary

Three evaluation report header fixes:

1. **Duplicate Job ID removed** — `EvaluationPoller.tsx` showed `ID: {job.id}` below the "Job Status" heading, redundant with the Reference ID already displayed at the top of the report card.

2. **Date Generated fallback** — `generatedLabel` was always "Not available" during in-progress evaluations because `canonicalDoc` is null until the report completes. Now falls back to `formatDetailDate(job.created_at)`.

3. **4th metadata column at 2xl** — The `<dl>` grid gains `2xl:grid-cols-4` so wide desktop screens (≥1536px) use the whitespace next to the Submission Preview. Mobile/tablet breakpoints unchanged (`sm:2`, `xl:3`). Genre Expectations span updated to match (`2xl:col-span-4`).

## Scope

Pass selection (CHECK EXACTLY ONE):

- [ ] Pass 1
- [ ] Pass 2
- [ ] Pass 3

No evaluation pipeline changes — UI-only.
